rows.label: qev061003_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Hm? It's rare to see an Earthling
in a place like this. What on
earth did you come here for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ferocious native creatures appear
around here, so this isn't the kind
of place you'd come without a purpose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_JNK0010
rows.name: Request

rows.label: qev061003_SEL0011
rows.name: Show the Golbogga Disk.

rows.label: qev061003_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev061003_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what Kiliran is doing.

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0003
rows.name: You were looking for me...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0004
rows.name:
I run all across this planet creating
a Voltant distribution map.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0005
rows.name:
It is absolutely necessary in order to
efficiently carry out the mission bestowed
upon us by Golbogga, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0006
rows.name: And you are...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Ah... You want me to
unlock this relic...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0012
rows.name:
Let me take a look. It seems to
be quite a rare item, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Well, I think I can manage it.
Alright, I will unlock it for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oh, right... It may not be much of a trade,
but could you exterminate the Xe-dom Sarto
that appears around here for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's attacked me many times during
my surveys, and I've been completely
at a loss on what to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll take responsibility and unlock the
disk, so please, lend me your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0013
rows.name:
It looks like unlocking the disk
is going to take a bit more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0014
rows.name:
Please go and subjugate the
Xe-dom Sarto in the meantime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thanks to that thing, the creation of the
Voltant distribution map is progressing at
a snail's pace, and it's quite troubling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0023
rows.name:
Oh! You exterminated that thing for
me! Thank you very much. Now my
stalled surveys can finally proceed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0024
rows.name:
I have finished unlocking the disk
on my end as well. Please, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0025
rows.name:
...It seems this contains information
about Bedun from before the rebirth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0026
rows.name:
It may even be possible to gaze upon
the true form of the creator, Golbogga.
Hehe... I am slightly curious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev061003_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask if he doesn't want to look inside.

rows.label: qev061003_JNK0060
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev061003_SEL0061
rows.name: Answer that you are curious.

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0027
rows.name:
Golbogga created us, and we simply undergo
Revoltant in accordance with their will.
Having that fact alone is more than enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0028
rows.name:
All that is left is to run around
like this to make it easier for my
brethren to undergo Revoltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0029
rows.name:
Your intellectual curiosity, having
an insatiable interest even in the
history of aliens... It's wonderful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0030
rows.name:
I cannot possibly muster the courage to learn
of it, but... I ask that you bring this truth
to light alongside a Zaruboggan who seeks it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Now then, I still have surveys
to conduct, so please excuse me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061003_MSG0032
rows.name:
I pray that Golbogga's divine protection
will be upon the path you walk.[ST:wait ]
